an_watch_list.title: Day 2-A Worldly Estate: Capturing The Legacy Of An International Connoisseur
Day 1-A Worldly Estate: Capturing The Legacy Of An International Connoisseur

listings.title: DJI AVATA 360 + 1 battery
listings.body: This is the brand new DJI Avata 360 released in late April 2026. If you already have the RC two or the goggles 3/and three and the motion controller then this is all you need to take to the skies full 360°. ABSOLUTELY NO LOWBALL OFFERS. I HAVE PRICED THESE TO SELL NOT NEGOTIATE. For a 3% fee, I can accept Credit/debit cards through my LLC. However, I must also collect sales tax if we go this route. All of my devices are brand new in the original packaging for the manufacturer.
